expected_issues.description: The prop is named visible instead of isOpen. Blade uses isOpen consistently for overlay/popover visibility (Tooltip, Popover, Drawer, Modal). visible is a non-standard term in this design system.

Using id as the step identifier prop conflicts with the HTML id attribute semantics and causes confusion when the prop is used on a component that also forwards an id to the DOM. The prop should be name — it is also a better match for the ref-based (not id-based) internal implementation.
The function is named gotToNext instead of goToNext — a typo. It should also be goToPrevious (not goToPrev) for consistency with full-word naming conventions.

The proposed web API uses getElementById to attach tour steps, but not all Blade components expose an id prop — this creates footguns with no type-level errors. The TourStep wrapper component should be used on both web and React Native for a consistent, type-safe API.
